title: Tender Mexican Savory Pistachio Chicken
description: A flavorful chicken dish that combines the spices of Mexico with the crunch of pistachios and the tenderness of chicken breast.
instructions: Rinse the chicken breast and pat dry with a paper towel.
In a small bowl, mix together savory seasoning blend, Mexican chili powder, and pistachio meal.
Brush the chicken with olive oil and sprinkle the spice mixture evenly over both sides.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Place the chicken on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until cooked through.
Let the chicken rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
Garnish with chopped cilantro, if desired.
